title: ShulkerLocator
description: Records and displays the locations of your placed Shulker Boxes
body:
Automatically records the coordinates of the shulker box you place.
Records are immediately deleted when you break a box. ## How to Use Type **/shulkerlocate** **Only shulker boxes placed after installing the mod will be tracked** ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f041cab9a4c49db612f291ab11fc71bae0c50a28.png) If another player moves your box while you're away, the mod will detect the missing block when you get close and automatically update your list. ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afea069d2d6ab03b055310e45fda2440e0db2c51.png)
